cn.description:
===铁皮公司正版授权===

比以往任何时候都更具威胁和力量，王国保卫战5 带来了一种全新、令人兴奋的体验，以其前作的快节奏和引人入胜的玩法为基础，赢得了奖项的赞誉。

当一个强大的邪恶势力在王国上空出现时，一个意想不到的联盟形成了——发动终极塔防战役，用两支军队中最精锐的力量来保卫整个王国和领域！虽然他们暂时并肩作战，但临时联盟内部典型的纷争可能会改变后续冒险的走向。

准备好释放双英雄的强大力量，在塔防战斗中扭转战局吧！
没错，现在你可以同时控制两条龙！双倍的喷火乐趣，双倍的混乱——只要确保他们不会因为谁能囤积更多的金子争吵！

所有重量级角色如圣骑士、弓箭手、法师、死灵法师等等都听你指挥。但要注意，他们可能会开始争论谁是队伍中的真正英雄，而敌人却悄悄溜过去！ 
你准备好迎接终极对决了吗？和利尼维亚的勇敢战士们以及不屈不挠的黑暗军团，踏上征服一个巨大敌人的史诗旅程。  

游戏特色：
招募34名独特的英雄和防御塔！

- 18个精英防御塔的建造和升级
骑士顶在最前方、弓箭手百步穿杨、法师的奥术魔法、死灵法师的亡灵之力，甚至还有能召唤恶魔的深渊祭坛！——这些经典强力塔都将听从你的号令！

- 16个史诗英雄 - 将塔防战斗提升到新的水平
同时控制2名英雄去战斗！
准备见证最不可能的双英雄组合的强大威力！森林守护灵搭配钢铁傀儡？
时空法师携手“普通勇士”？看似离奇的搭档，也能爆发惊人威力！

- 6种不同地形，更有迷人的战场等你征服
保卫Kingdom Rush的多彩景观。穿越王国深林，甚至其危险的洞穴作战。

- 25个充满快节奏塔防战斗的战役阶段
在充满惊喜挑战和细节的异国地形中设定你的策略。
面对成群的不可预测的敌人和史诗般的boss战斗，将你的防御策略推向极限！

- 3种不同的游戏模式来测试你的实力
在取得胜利后，尝试以更具挑战性的方式玩每个阶段。谁不喜欢一个好的挑战呢？

- 58多个游戏成就在战斗中征服
没有诱人的奖励，史诗策略游戏算什么？展示你的技能，解锁奖励！

- 45种以上不同的敌人来测试你的塔防智慧
展现联盟的塔防战斗技能，对抗4个不同的敌人氏族。用独特的防御策略击败他们每一个！

- 当然…
有很多复活节彩蛋和Ironhide Game Studio一贯的轻松幽默。
因为没有一些隐藏的惊喜，策略游戏算什么呢？

歡迎來到 Inkblade Idlers，一款將水墨畫的寧靜意境，與武俠世界的熱血豪情完美結合的掛機角色扮演遊戲。

輕鬆暢玩，策略深度並存
你的俠客將自動修煉與戰鬥，即使離線也能持續獲得銀兩與經驗。回到遊戲後，投入資源強化武功、裝備神兵利器與研習稀有秘籍，穩步推進你的江湖實力。

挑戰武林霸主，蒐集失傳絕學
迎戰威震四方的武林強者，展開一場場巔峰對決。每一次勝利，都能解鎖失傳的武功秘籍，讓俠客習得獨門絕技，自由打造專屬於你的戰鬥流派。

經營你的武俠世界
升級商鋪以提升收入，擴充背包收納更多珍稀裝備，並策略性配置你的隊伍。每一個決定，都是邁向一代宗師的重要一步。

遊戲特色
- 絕美水墨風格，打造充滿生命力的武俠世界
- 真正的掛機玩法，二十四小時持續成長
- 海量收集內容，包含武器、防具與稀有武功秘籍
- 策略經營系統，平衡資源、收益與戰力成長
- 多樣強力頭目戰，考驗俠客陣容的極限實力

立即下載 Inkblade Idlers，展開一段悠然卻強大的武俠旅程，無需重複練功，也能成就一代傳奇。

hk.description: The table features the player as a member of a space fleet that completes missions to increase rank. Players can attain nine different ranks (listed from lowest to highest): Cadet, Ensign, Lieutenant, Captain, LT Commander, Commander, Commodore, Admiral, and Fleet Admiral. Players accept a mission by hitting "mission targets" which select which mission they will take, and by going up the "launch ramp". Each mission has a set number of things for players to do, such as hitting the "attack bumpers" (which are a set of four bumpers at the top of the table) eight times (this is the "target practice" mission). Some missions involve a number of steps which must be completed in sequence. Missions end either by being completed, or by being aborted due to running out of "fuel", as indicated by the lights in the passage that passes under the launch ramp. The "fuel" lights go out one by one at a time interval, and can be re-lit by having the ball go over them, or all at once by going up the launch ramp again. Upon completing a mission, some of the blue lights in a circle in the middle of the table turn on. When all of the lights in the blue circle turn on, the player's rank increases, and a light in the orange circle turns on.

hk.description:
Motorsport Manager Mobile 3 is the ultimate race team strategy game. 

Build up your very own motorsport team from scratch, making every big decision. Hire the drivers, assemble the team, develop your car and mastermind your way to glory.

• This is your racing team. Hire drivers, develop your car and invest in technology.
• Work with your drivers to achieve the perfect qualifying lap.
• Formulate the ideal pitstop strategy to win races.
• Watch the race in real-time or jump into the strategy screens to take control of the action.
• React to weather changes, crashes and safety car periods.
• Win championships across the world to reach the pinnacle of motorsport.

New in MM Mobile 3
=====================
GT AND ENDURANCE RACING
With 6 new championships, MM Mobile 3 is bigger and better than ever before. GT races bring action-packed, wheel-to-wheel action, while Endurance is a Motorsport Manager’s ultimate strategic challenge, with 3 drivers per car and timed races!

A STUNNING SETTING
Monaco makes its Motorsport Manager debut! Manage your cars around la Rascasse, Casino Square and the Swimming Pool. It’s the ultimate test, rendered in a beautiful, detailed new art style.

AUGMENTED REALITY
AR support brings you the ultimate camera mode! Choose your own perspective on the race. Peer over trees, through bridges and down cliffsides as you experience races in a whole new way.

NEW FEATURES
The Supplier Network sees managers grow their team’s presence around the globe, while Invitational Races are huge annual events, bringing international races with a unique twist. Mechanics are the new members of your team, and their relationship with the driver is all-important!

GAME CHANGERS
Votes on rule changes, dynamic AI team movement (including teams going bust and being replaced) and new difficulty settings mean that the world of motorsport constantly evolves – but the challenge stays at your level.

ON-TRACK ACTION
Energy Recovery System, with Hybrid and Power modes, mixes up every race! Will you boost your way past your rivals into clear air, or smartly manage your fuel levels to pull off a genius strategy?

hk.description:
想像一個神奇的工廠正出現在您的客廳。精心策劃的傑作，在這裏，勤奮的工人將客戶想要的一切匯集在一起。可以用衆多不同的材料製造橡皮鴨和梳妝台、無人駕駛飛機和電吉他、踏板車和其他精美的商品，並以現金出售 – 您將現金投資回工廠，以獲得更多機器、更多工人並發展業務。您在Little Big Workshop中成為工廠大亨！

真正的工廠 - 充滿樂趣
您是大老闆，現在是時候負責您自己的桌面工廠了。組織工廠車間，管理您的工人，購買機械並設計高效的生產線 - 所有這些都在規定期限內完成，並讓您的客戶滿意！ 

開放式沙盒體驗
放輕鬆，這是一個沙盒體驗游戲，您可以在其中思考、衡量和鑽研事物，直到它們按照您想要的方式工作。當您生產超過50種獨特的產品類型（由多個零件和零件製成）時，向客戶和不斷變化的市場供應產品 - 所有這些都可以用不同的材料和生產方法來製造。沒有兩個工廠看起來相同。

小小手，大夢想
從一個小作坊開始，然後擴展到佈滿桌子的工廠。解鎖更先進的機器，增加更多的生產方法，還有最重要的，增加空間。很快，您將運行多條生產線，每天生產成百上千的先進產品，並欣喜地觀看可愛的工人完成實際工作。

特點：
- 各種各樣的行業和廣泛的產品
- 側重於實際問題，而不是價值、經濟或物流
- 在藍圖上組織生產的所有步驟
- 隨著您解鎖更多的辦公桌空間，工廠將發展
- 全面模擬的日/夜週期
- 照顧好您的工人！如果使他們太辛苦地工作，他們會像蒼蠅一樣墜落
- 可愛的模型城鎮藝術風格

hk.description:
經典的砍殺遊戲終於推出 iOS 版，Heart Machine這款曾獲獎的遊戲現在以最精良且優質的特殊版本登場。


► 在享有盛譽的獨立遊戲節（Independent Games Festival）中獲得觀眾人氣大獎以及最佳視覺美術獎。

► 在最佳視覺設計、最佳音效以及最佳原創遊戲類別中獲得超過 14 項提名。

► 9/10 Destructoid – 卓越表現的典範。儘管有缺失但仍瑕不掩瑜，且不至於對遊戲造成重大影響。

► 9.5/10 Game Informer – 配樂、美術以及打鬥場景值得您沉浸其中並深入探索。

► Eurogamer 推薦 – Heart Machine 開發的砍殺遊戲不僅充滿挑戰性，且非常細緻，畫面也十分漂亮。

► 9/10 GameSpot – 不僅僅是單純的畫面漂亮；《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》所呈現的視覺效果可以指引您，且讓您放鬆。在緊張刺激的打鬥場景中，壯觀美景能讓您稍喘口氣。 

► 8.5 Polygon – 無論是思考戰略的時刻或是驚險的動作場景，《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》取得了兩者之間的完美平衡。

► Darkstation 5 顆星–上帝視角的動作角色扮演遊戲《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》非常棒：漂亮、迷人的世界供探索、遊戲操作靈敏、悅耳的配樂，並且對玩家有信心，相信他們可以自己想出遊戲進行的方式。


黑暗且暴力的過往陰影籠罩著這片不羈之地，當中滿是寶藏與鮮血。這個世界的旅者是收藏家，專門收集遺忘的知識、失落的科技以及破碎的歷史。我們的旅者被一種無法滿足的疾病纏身，朝著時間埋葬之地深入挺進，希望能找到治癒重症的方法。

《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》是動作冒險角色扮演遊戲，使用經典的16-bit 模式，再加上現代化的遊戲機制與更大規模的設計。探索這個美麗且廣大的荒廢之地，當中危機四伏且暗藏著失落科技。


特色：

● 支援 iPad Pro 120 fps 的畫面幀率/支援 iPhone 與 iPad 60 fps的畫面幀率。
● 與 MFi 控制手把相容。
● 遊戲中心（Game Center）成就。
● 觸覺震動。
● 從每一位角色到細緻的背景元素，一切都是手繪動畫的心血傑作。
● 容易上手但難以駕馭；敵人又壞又多，處處危機讓您脆弱的身體不堪一擊，且盟友又寥寥可數。
● 升級武器、學習新技能、探索裝備，在這個黑暗且暗藏細節的世界中，穿越一條條的路徑支線，揭開秘密。
● 沉浸在由Disasterpeace 所作的美妙配樂中。
● 不僅有原始遊戲中的所有內容，再加上更多武器、敵人以及特殊版本的區域。

hk.releaseNotes:
- And various UI/UX enhancements with bug fixes for a smoother experience.

Previously,

Lumy's OS 26 update is designed to feel lighter, smarter, and more in sync with daily life.

On iPhone and iPad
- Discover the new Liquid Glass design: UI elements feel gently illuminated, carrying a subtle echo of sunlight.
- New Peek Panel: A lightweight element that quietly shows simple info like "Moon above horizon." It fluidly expands to reveal more detail, such as "Sets in 20 min" when you need it, fading back automatically. Designed to balance presence and absence, it keeps information accessible without overwhelming the interface.
- A refreshed Bottom Bar with Quick Access Menu that morphs naturally with interaction, making it faster to switch modes or jump around the app.
- Make the Quick Access Menu your own by reordering modes... the first three are always at your fingertips.
- The new Season widget now lets you choose between astronomical or meteorological seasons.
- Updated widgets and app icons now match the new home screen's tinted and clear styles.
- And many thoughtful refinements across the app.

Foundation Model Features (iOS 26 + iPadOS 26)
- Mode-Specific Weather Insights: Smarter, activity-aware tips.
- State of Mind Suggestions: Personalized, context-aware guidance that adapts to your state of mind log.
- Astronomical Events: Tailored explanations that transform solar events into relevant insights for Photography, Hiking, Mindfulness, or Travel.
- Review System: A simple thumbs up/down or alternative request helps refine future insights, while keeping all data private on your device.

On Apple Watch
- Experience the new Liquid Glass design on your wrist.
- Quickly enable or disable sun event notifications right from Control Center.
- Add a configurable Season complication for astronomical or meteorological seasons.
- Added support for the latest iPhone 17 Series, iPhone Air, Apple Watch Series 11, Apple Watch Ultra 3, and Apple Watch SE 3.

Thanks for being part of this journey. Your feedback continues to shape Lumy, and we'd love to hear your thoughts or suggestions at hello@waplestuff.com.
hk.description:
Lumy is a modern sun tracker + outdoor activity planner.

- Perfect lighting for photos or videos? Done.
- Sunrise hike or sunset walk? Easy.
- Outdoor yoga or sunlight breaks? Covered.

Whether you’re chasing golden hour* or keeping an eye on moon phases for a night under the stars, Lumy helps you make the most of natural light.

Now redesigned from the ground up - Lumy feels more personal, purposeful, and in sync with how we live. 

Introducing Modes: Switch between profiles like Daily, Photography, or Meditation to shape Lumy around your routine. See only what matters to you.

Lumy also supports iOS’s State of Mind feature, offering sunlight suggestions based on your mood entries in the Health app - a gentle nudge to step out and connect with nature.

And with weather forecasts for the next seven days, you can plan with confidence. Lumy calculates all sun and moon data entirely on-device. No tracking. No server calls. Only the weather needs internet.

Lumy works seamlessly across iPhone, iPad, Apple Watch, Apple TV, and HomePod. One purchase, full family access.

Features
- Modes: Switch profiles based on your needs... from weekday planning to weekend golden hour.
- Sun + Moon Tracking: Accurate data, solar compass, and future predictions.
- Season Info: Both astronomical and meteorological seasons.
- Remainders: Custom repeatable notifications.
- Apple Watch: Complications, Double-tap, and Live Activities.
- Widgets + Control Center: Quick access via Smart Stack and more.
- Interaction Upgrades: Time travel slider, Quick Access Button, fluid animations.
- Visual Feel: Simulated light, shimmering glows, and enhanced Classic visuals.
- Accessibility: VoiceOver, Dynamic Type, Reduce Motion, and more.
- Privacy First: Fully offline (except weather). Your data stays with you.
- Localization: Available in Japanese, Chinese, French, and German.

Lumy helps photographers, outdoor lovers, and wellness seekers stay in sync with the sun and moon.

*What's Golden Hour?
Golden Hour (or Magic Hour) is the short time after sunrise or before sunset when the light is soft, warm, and perfect for capturing stunning photos or videos.

Sun Information Available:
Sunrise, Sunset, First Light, Last Light, Golden Hour, Blue Hour, Astronomical Twilight, Nautical Twilight, Civil Twilight, Solar Noon, Solar Midnight.

Moon Information Available:
Moonrise, Moonset, Altitude, Azimuth, Transit, Transit Elevation, Weekly Moon Phase, Next Full Moon, New Moon, First Quarter, Last Quarter.

Got feedback or suggestions? We’d love to hear from you! Reach out at hello@waplestuff.com.

***注意：Don`t Starve需要iOS 8和至少iPhone 5、iPad 3或iPad mini 2。由於記憶體限制，它無法在更早的裝置上執行。***

Don`t Starve: Pocket Edition行動版將深受超過4百萬玩家喜愛的熱門PC遊戲移植到了iPhone和iPad平台。現在你可以隨時隨地進入充滿科學和魔法元素的世界，體驗原汁原味的荒野生存遊戲！

你扮演威爾遜，一位被困住並傳送到神秘荒野世界的勇敢無畏的紳士科學家。如果威爾遜希望逃出生天並找到回家的路，他必須充分利用所處的環境及這裡的各種生物。

進入一個光怪陸離而未經探索的世界，這裡充滿了奇怪的生物以及形形色色的危險和意外。收集資源以製作符合你的生存風格的物品和建築。一路解開這塊奇怪大陸上的各種謎團。

********************************************************

獎項：
- 獨立遊戲節：大獎提名
 - 獨立遊戲節：優秀設計獎提名
 - 獨立遊戲節：玩家選擇獎提名
 - Capsule Computers：編輯選擇獎
 - Indie Game Reviewer：年度最佳遊戲

主要特色：

針對觸控操作進行優化：新的直觀觸控介面讓你可以輕鬆探索、戰鬥、合成和管理物品。

原汁原味的生存和世界探索體驗：沒有說明。沒有幫助。無需手持。從一無所有開始，為了生存而合成物品、捕獵、研究、耕種和戰鬥。

黑暗而異想天開的視覺效果：處於獨特3D世界中的2D人物和古怪生物。

隨機產生的新世界：想要新地圖？沒問題！你可以隨時產生一個不斷變化的全新世界，它憎恨你並想你死掉。

Punch your way through the Streets of Rage once again!

Streets of Rage 4 takes forward the Streets of Rage legacy in this retro beat'em up with hand-drawn comic inspired graphics and updated mechanics.

Streets of Rage comes back for a sequel 25 years after the last episode : a new crime syndicate seems to have taken control of the streets and corrupted the police. All you have to fight against them is your friends... and your fists ! Critically acclaimed, Streets of Rage 4 won several awards and nominated as Best Action Games at the 2020 Game Awards.

FEATURES
- Rediscover the classic Beat em up Streets of Rage Franchise with new fight mechanics
- Get thrilled by the Retro hand-drawn comics-inspired artistic direction by the studio behind Wonder Boy: The Dragon’s Trap serving juicy animations & vivid FX
- Unlock up to 5 new & emblematic playable characters and fight your way through 12 various stages to bring back order to the streets
- Challenge yourself in different modes : Story, Training, Arcade...
- Listen to a new Electro OST with world class musicians such as Olivier Derivière and legend Yuzo Koshiro
- Brand-new custom survival mode to the DLC (Mr. X Nightmare)
- New destroyables to help to maintain the combo counter"- Get retro with up to 13 alternative retro characters, secret retro levels or choose the SoR1&2 OST and enable the Retro Pixel graphics !

* NEW MAJOR FREE UPDATE*

- New co-op moves
- +300 in-game improvements
- Brand-new custom survival mode to the DLC (Mr. X Nightmare)
- New destroyables to help to maintain the combo counter

-MULTIPLAYER UPDATE-

- Play online with a partner and gang up to defeat the Y twins' evil plan together!
- Test your strength : hop in Battle Mode and fight your friends across your favorite levels"

-Mr. X Nightmare DLC-
The fight continues in Wood Oak City.
After the events of Streets of Rage 4, our heroes wanted to prepare themselves for future threats. Axel, Blaze and their mates will start a very special deranged training with the help of Dr. Zan, who built an AI program from the remnants of Mister X’s brain that simulates every kind of danger they could be facing. 
With this DLC, get ready for:
• 3 new playable characters
• A new Survival mode with weekly challenges
• Character customization: build your own fighting style with new moves
• New weapons and enemies!o note that multiplayer mode will not be available at launch but will come in a free update after release.

CAREFULLY REDESIGNED FOR MOBILE
- Revamped interface
- Game Center achievements
- iCloud - Share your progress between iOS devices
- Compatible with MFicontrollers
- No micro-transactions!

Crack your knuckles and get ready for Streets of Rage 4 everywhere you go!

If you run into a problem, please contact us at support@playdigious.mail.helpshift.com with as much information as possible on the issue, or check our FAQ at https://playdigious.helpshift.com/hc/en/6-streets-of-rage-4/

hk.description:
IMPORTANT: "Parallel Experiment" is a 2-player cooperative puzzle game with escape room-like elements. Each player must have their own copy on either mobile, tablet, PC or Mac (cross-platform play is supported).

In the game players take on the roles of two detectives who are often separated, each with different clues, and must work together to solve puzzles.  Internet connection and voice communication are essential. Need a Player Two? Join our community on Discord!

ABOUT THE GAME

Parallel Experiment is a noir-inspired adventure with a comic book art style, featuring detectives Ally and Old Dog. While following the trail of the dangerous Cryptic Killer, they suddenly become his targets and are now unwilling participants in his twisted experiment. 

This is the second standalone chapter in the “Cryptic Killer” cooperative point-and-click puzzle game series. You can play Unboxing the Cryptic Killer first, if you want to learn more about our detectives and their nemesis, but Parallel Experiment can be enjoyed without prior knowledge.

KEY FEATURES

- Two Player Co-Op

​In Parallel Experiment, players must rely on their communication skills as they’re separated and must each discover unique clues that are vital for solving puzzles on the other end. Teamwork is essential to crack the Cryptic Killer’s codes.

- Challenging Collaborative Puzzles

​There are over 80 puzzles striking the perfect balance between challenging yet fair. But you're not facing them on your own! Communicate with your partner on how to best proceed, solve a puzzle on your end that unlocks the next step for them and discover a wide variety of puzzles from redirecting water flows, finding computer passwords and unlocking intricate locks, to deciphering cryptic ciphers, soldering electronic components, and even waking up a drunk!

- Two Can Play That Game

​Looking for a break from the main investigation? Dive into a variety of retro-inspired mini-games designed with a fresh cooperative twist. Challenge each other to darts, Three in a Row, Match Three, Claw Machine, Push and Pull, and more. Think you know these classics? We’ve reinvented them for a whole new co-op experience

- Cooperative Dialogues

​Uncover vital clues through collaborative conversations. NPCs respond dynamically to each player, offering new layers of interaction that only teamwork can unravel. Some conversations are puzzles in themselves that you need to solve together!

- A story told in panels

Our love for comic books shines in Parallel Experiment. Every cutscene is presented as a beautifully crafted comic book page, immersing you in a gripping, noir-inspired narrative.

How many pages did we create to tell the story? Almost 100 pages! Even we were surprised by how much it took, but every panel was worth it to deliver a story that keeps you on edge until the very last frame.

- Draw on… Everything!

​Every detective needs a notebook. In Parallel Experiment, players can jot down notes, sketch solutions, and interact with the environment in creative ways. But we all know what you're going to draw first…

- Annoy Each Other

​This is a key feature? Yes. Yes, it is. ​

​Each level will have some way for players to annoy their co-op partner: knock on a window to distract them, poke them, make their screens shake. You already know you'll be doing this just by reading it, right?



Parallel Experiment has a variety of mind-twisting challenges that push the boundaries of cooperative puzzle design, offering situations never seen before in other games.

hk.description:
SOLVE A CRYPTIC BOX
Unboxing the Cryptic Killer is the first standalone chapter to the cooperative point-and-click puzzle game series 'Cryptic Killer'. Join forces with a friend and play as detective partners Ally and Old Dog in our debut two-player escape room adventure.



IMPORTANT: "Unboxing the Cryptic Killer" is a 2-player cooperative puzzle game, that requires each player to have their own copy on either mobile, tablet, PC or Mac. Internet connection and voice communication are essential. Need a Player Two? Join our Discord community!



Two seasoned detectives, Ally and Old Dog, are entangled in a chilling unsolved case. Lured on a perilous trail, they fall into the clutches of the enigmatic Cryptic Killer they've been relentlessly pursuing. The stakes are sky-high as two innocent lives hang in the balance. In order to save them, Ally and Old Dog must unravel a box of intricate puzzles masterfully designed by the nefarious killer. Test your mettle and join this high-stakes race against time, where every puzzle solved is a step closer to unmasking the Cryptic Killer.



THE ONLY WAY TO ESCAPE IS TO WORK TOGETHER
Unboxing the Cryptic Killer is a puzzle for exactly two players. The name of the game is collaboration. Each player takes on one of the two roles and works their way through a series of challenging puzzles. You'll each see one half of the same puzzle and must work together to crack the codes and escape the Cryptic Killer's clutches.



FEATURES LIST
▶Two Player Co-Op 
In Unboxing the Cryptic Killer, the detectives are separated. You’ll see different items and clues than your partner, and will be tested on your communication!
▶Challenging Collaborative Puzzles
Two brains are better than one when it comes to cracking the Cryptic Killer's codes.
▶Unravel a Thrilling Story
Track the Cryptic Killer's movements as Detectives Old Dog and Ally in this ongoing murder mystery saga.
▶Explore Illustrated Worlds
Unboxing the Cryptic Killer features hand-illustrated environments that are inspired by noir novels.
▶Draw on… Everything!
You cannot solve a case without taking notes. At any time in the game, you can whip out a notebook and pen to make notes and scribble on your environment.

hk.description:
SEIZE FORBIDDEN TREASURES. SUMMON ALIEN GODS. FEED ON YOUR DISCIPLES.

BE WARNED. This game has no tutorial - part of the challenge is figuring out how to play. It's hard, but keep trying, and you'll master it. Good luck!

In this infamous roguelike narrative card game, play as a seeker after unholy mysteries in a 1920s-themed setting of hidden gods and secret histories. Become a scholar of the unseen arts. Craft tools and summon spirits. Indoctrinate innocents. Seize your place as the herald of a new age.

Cultist Simulator was first released on PC and has more than 200,000 players all over the world. Now we’re bringing the cosmic mysteries of Cultist Simulator to mobile.

• Challenging roguelike gameplay - There is never only one history.
Cultist Simulator doesn’t hold your hand. Experiment, expire and transcend death with a story-driven legacy system. Over time you’ll learn enough to wrestle the game to its knees.

• Intense, immersive narrative – Combine cards to tell your own story.
A hefty novel’s worth of choice-based storytelling, from the creator of Fallen London and Sunless Sea. There are many paths through this game of ambition, appetite and abomination, and many ways your tale can end.

• A rich Lovecraftian world – Corrupt your friends and consume your enemies.
Search your dreams for sanity-twisting rituals. Translate grimoires and glean their lore. Penetrate the realm of the Hours and win a place in their service. Cultist Simulator brings the peripheral horror of Lovecraft’s tales to an entirely new setting.

Expand your knowledge with the DLCs: New Legacies, New Ascensions, New Mechanics...
• The Dancer - Join the Bacchanal
• The Priest - Knock, and Ye Shall Be Opened
• The Ghoul - Taste of the graveyard's fruit
• The Exile - Some there are who will not yield

If you encounter any issue with the game, please click on “Contact us” at the bottom of this page and give us as many details as possible regarding the issue and your device: https://playdigious.helpshift.com/hc/en/11-cultist-simulator/?p=ios

*線上合作模式現已開放：分享代碼給好友，一起冒險吧！*

《Children of Morta》是一款以故事為主軸的動作 RPG，結合了 Roguelite 的角色成長特色。在遊戲中，玩家將操控的不僅僅是一位角色，而是一個非凡的英雄家族。

在隨機生成的地牢、洞穴和土地中砍殺成群的敵人，帶領擁有各自優缺點的柏格森家族對抗即將來臨的腐化。故事發生在遙遠的世界，卻觸及我們每個人都熟悉的情感與主題：愛與希望，渴望與不安，失落……以及為了拯救最重要的人所願意付出的犧牲。
這是一個關於英雄家族團結一致，對抗侵襲黑暗的動人故事。

-- 完全版 --

《Ancient Spirits》和《Paws and Claws》DLC 都包含在主遊戲中並可在遊戲過程中解鎖。

特色
- 歡迎加入家族！與英雄般的柏格森家族一起面對挑戰，傳承家族榮耀，拯救瑞亞之地免受腐化侵襲
- 同心協力：在這款 Roguelite RPG 中，每次冒險都能提升整個家族的技能和裝備，讓他們變得更強
- 團結力量大：在七位可操控角色間自由切換，每位角色都有獨特的能力、戰鬥風格和迷人的個性
- 沉浸於瑞亞美麗又致命的世界中，精美的 2D 像素藝術結合手工動畫和現代光影技術，帶來視覺享受
- 家族並肩作戰：利用雙人線上合作模式，在每場戰鬥中並肩作戰（此功能將在發佈後更新推出）

精心為手機重新設計
- 全新介面設計——專為手機打造的專屬 UI，完全支援觸控操作
- 支援 Game Center 成就系統
- 雲端存檔——在 iOS 裝置間共享遊戲進度
- 支援 MFi 控制器
- iPhone 15 最佳化（包括 Pro Max）

這次不僅冒險家加入戰鬥，還有帝國軍隊和被稱為「卡倫之英雄」的領袖共同發動全面攻擊，決心一舉根絕魔族。
他們以壓倒性的人數攻陷了魔族堡壘，並成功將其徹底摧毀。城堡中的所有魔族都被俘虜，唯獨一個名叫「孤骨」的孤獨骷髏逃脫了。

遊戲特色

- 換上新的孤骨，感受失去頭顱的痛快：借用前任擁有者的力量和華服，搭配獨特的道具來創造連鎖技能，戰勝敵人。
- 不死不休：在這款動作滿載的rogue-lite平台遊戲中，你將迎接一切挑戰，直至最終。
- 觀賞充滿活力、風格卡通的像素藝術2D動畫，幫助各種魔族生物恢復本來面目。
- 從埃及的木乃伊到希臘的牛頭怪，甚至《Dead Cells》的官方跨界合作……你能找到遊戲中所有有趣的彩蛋嗎？

hk.description:
這是一款關於生、死、心願與延續的App。

小時候，我以爲自己是不會老去的彼得·潘，卻終究敵不過健康磨損，容顏老去。
時針轉動，生命流逝，但每一次心跳都可以更加有力。

有時候，生命隻是一連串的數字，多少年，多少月，多少小時，多少分鐘。當你意識到這個時，往往陷入巨大的虛無感之中，惶恐不能自拔。
而現在，這些數字可以成爲你重塑生命的坐標，指引你走向更健康、更長久的未來。

生辰 2.0 通過 AI 分析和科學判斷，不僅預測生命的終點，更爲你鋪就延長生命的道路：

- 探索你的生命時鐘：了解當下的預期壽命，直麵生命的有限與珍貴。
- 髮現延壽的可能：看見改變健康習慣能爲你帶來多少額外的生命時光。
- 聚合健康數據：自動追踪睡眠、鍛煉、壓力（HRV）、經期、喝水等十餘種健康數據

美國詩人納·斯待爾在87歲那年冩道：
"如果我能夠從頭活過，我會試着犯更多的錯。
我會放鬆一點，我會靈活一點。
我會爬更多的山，遊更多的河，看更多的日落。"

因爲了解生命的終點，才能更好地珍惜當下的每一刻。生辰2.0 探索健康的可能，讓我們成爲你健康旅程的長久夥伴。

The table features the player as a member of a space fleet that completes missions to increase rank. Players can attain nine different ranks (listed from lowest to highest): Cadet, Ensign, Lieutenant, Captain, LT Commander, Commander, Commodore, Admiral, and Fleet Admiral. Players accept a mission by hitting "mission targets" which select which mission they will take, and by going up the "launch ramp". Each mission has a set number of things for players to do, such as hitting the "attack bumpers" (which are a set of four bumpers at the top of the table) eight times (this is the "target practice" mission). Some missions involve a number of steps which must be completed in sequence. Missions end either by being completed, or by being aborted due to running out of "fuel", as indicated by the lights in the passage that passes under the launch ramp. The "fuel" lights go out one by one at a time interval, and can be re-lit by having the ball go over them, or all at once by going up the launch ramp again. Upon completing a mission, some of the blue lights in a circle in the middle of the table turn on. When all of the lights in the blue circle turn on, the player's rank increases, and a light in the orange circle turns on.

mo.description:
Motorsport Manager Mobile 3 is the ultimate race team strategy game. 

Build up your very own motorsport team from scratch, making every big decision. Hire the drivers, assemble the team, develop your car and mastermind your way to glory.

• This is your racing team. Hire drivers, develop your car and invest in technology.
• Work with your drivers to achieve the perfect qualifying lap.
• Formulate the ideal pitstop strategy to win races.
• Watch the race in real-time or jump into the strategy screens to take control of the action.
• React to weather changes, crashes and safety car periods.
• Win championships across the world to reach the pinnacle of motorsport.

New in MM Mobile 3
=====================
GT AND ENDURANCE RACING
With 6 new championships, MM Mobile 3 is bigger and better than ever before. GT races bring action-packed, wheel-to-wheel action, while Endurance is a Motorsport Manager’s ultimate strategic challenge, with 3 drivers per car and timed races!

A STUNNING SETTING
Monaco makes its Motorsport Manager debut! Manage your cars around la Rascasse, Casino Square and the Swimming Pool. It’s the ultimate test, rendered in a beautiful, detailed new art style.

AUGMENTED REALITY
AR support brings you the ultimate camera mode! Choose your own perspective on the race. Peer over trees, through bridges and down cliffsides as you experience races in a whole new way.

NEW FEATURES
The Supplier Network sees managers grow their team’s presence around the globe, while Invitational Races are huge annual events, bringing international races with a unique twist. Mechanics are the new members of your team, and their relationship with the driver is all-important!

GAME CHANGERS
Votes on rule changes, dynamic AI team movement (including teams going bust and being replaced) and new difficulty settings mean that the world of motorsport constantly evolves – but the challenge stays at your level.

ON-TRACK ACTION
Energy Recovery System, with Hybrid and Power modes, mixes up every race! Will you boost your way past your rivals into clear air, or smartly manage your fuel levels to pull off a genius strategy?

真正的工廠 - 充滿樂趣
您是大老闆，現在是時候負責您自己的桌面工廠了。組織工廠車間，管理您的工人，購買機械並設計高效的生產線 - 所有這些都在規定期限內完成，並讓您的客戶滿意！

mo.description:
經典的砍殺遊戲終於推出 iOS 版，Heart Machine這款曾獲獎的遊戲現在以最精良且優質的特殊版本登場。


► 在享有盛譽的獨立遊戲節（Independent Games Festival）中獲得觀眾人氣大獎以及最佳視覺美術獎。

► 在最佳視覺設計、最佳音效以及最佳原創遊戲類別中獲得超過 14 項提名。

► 9/10 Destructoid – 卓越表現的典範。儘管有缺失但仍瑕不掩瑜，且不至於對遊戲造成重大影響。

► 9.5/10 Game Informer – 配樂、美術以及打鬥場景值得您沉浸其中並深入探索。

► Eurogamer 推薦 – Heart Machine 開發的砍殺遊戲不僅充滿挑戰性，且非常細緻，畫面也十分漂亮。

► 9/10 GameSpot – 不僅僅是單純的畫面漂亮；《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》所呈現的視覺效果可以指引您，且讓您放鬆。在緊張刺激的打鬥場景中，壯觀美景能讓您稍喘口氣。 

► 8.5 Polygon – 無論是思考戰略的時刻或是驚險的動作場景，《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》取得了兩者之間的完美平衡。

► Darkstation 5 顆星–上帝視角的動作角色扮演遊戲《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》非常棒：漂亮、迷人的世界供探索、遊戲操作靈敏、悅耳的配樂，並且對玩家有信心，相信他們可以自己想出遊戲進行的方式。


黑暗且暴力的過往陰影籠罩著這片不羈之地，當中滿是寶藏與鮮血。這個世界的旅者是收藏家，專門收集遺忘的知識、失落的科技以及破碎的歷史。我們的旅者被一種無法滿足的疾病纏身，朝著時間埋葬之地深入挺進，希望能找到治癒重症的方法。

《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》是動作冒險角色扮演遊戲，使用經典的16-bit 模式，再加上現代化的遊戲機制與更大規模的設計。探索這個美麗且廣大的荒廢之地，當中危機四伏且暗藏著失落科技。


特色：

● 支援 iPad Pro 120 fps 的畫面幀率/支援 iPhone 與 iPad 60 fps的畫面幀率。
● 與 MFi 控制手把相容。
● 遊戲中心（Game Center）成就。
● 觸覺震動。
● 從每一位角色到細緻的背景元素，一切都是手繪動畫的心血傑作。
● 容易上手但難以駕馭；敵人又壞又多，處處危機讓您脆弱的身體不堪一擊，且盟友又寥寥可數。
● 升級武器、學習新技能、探索裝備，在這個黑暗且暗藏細節的世界中，穿越一條條的路徑支線，揭開秘密。
● 沉浸在由Disasterpeace 所作的美妙配樂中。
● 不僅有原始遊戲中的所有內容，再加上更多武器、敵人以及特殊版本的區域。

你扮演威爾遜，一位被困住並傳送到神秘荒野世界的勇敢無畏的紳士科學家。如果威爾遜希望逃出生天並找到回家的路，他必須充分利用所處的環境及這裡的各種生物。

進入一個光怪陸離而未經探索的世界，這裡充滿了奇怪的生物以及形形色色的危險和意外。收集資源以製作符合你的生存風格的物品和建築。一路解開這塊奇怪大陸上的各種謎團。

mo.description:
IMPORTANT: "Parallel Experiment" is a 2-player cooperative puzzle game with escape room-like elements. Each player must have their own copy on either mobile, tablet, PC or Mac (cross-platform play is supported).

In the game players take on the roles of two detectives who are often separated, each with different clues, and must work together to solve puzzles.  Internet connection and voice communication are essential. Need a Player Two? Join our community on Discord!

ABOUT THE GAME

Parallel Experiment is a noir-inspired adventure with a comic book art style, featuring detectives Ally and Old Dog. While following the trail of the dangerous Cryptic Killer, they suddenly become his targets and are now unwilling participants in his twisted experiment. 

This is the second standalone chapter in the “Cryptic Killer” cooperative point-and-click puzzle game series. You can play Unboxing the Cryptic Killer first, if you want to learn more about our detectives and their nemesis, but Parallel Experiment can be enjoyed without prior knowledge.

KEY FEATURES

- Two Player Co-Op

​In Parallel Experiment, players must rely on their communication skills as they’re separated and must each discover unique clues that are vital for solving puzzles on the other end. Teamwork is essential to crack the Cryptic Killer’s codes.

- Challenging Collaborative Puzzles

​There are over 80 puzzles striking the perfect balance between challenging yet fair. But you're not facing them on your own! Communicate with your partner on how to best proceed, solve a puzzle on your end that unlocks the next step for them and discover a wide variety of puzzles from redirecting water flows, finding computer passwords and unlocking intricate locks, to deciphering cryptic ciphers, soldering electronic components, and even waking up a drunk!

- Two Can Play That Game

​Looking for a break from the main investigation? Dive into a variety of retro-inspired mini-games designed with a fresh cooperative twist. Challenge each other to darts, Three in a Row, Match Three, Claw Machine, Push and Pull, and more. Think you know these classics? We’ve reinvented them for a whole new co-op experience

- Cooperative Dialogues

​Uncover vital clues through collaborative conversations. NPCs respond dynamically to each player, offering new layers of interaction that only teamwork can unravel. Some conversations are puzzles in themselves that you need to solve together!

- A story told in panels

Our love for comic books shines in Parallel Experiment. Every cutscene is presented as a beautifully crafted comic book page, immersing you in a gripping, noir-inspired narrative.

How many pages did we create to tell the story? Almost 100 pages! Even we were surprised by how much it took, but every panel was worth it to deliver a story that keeps you on edge until the very last frame.

- Draw on… Everything!

​Every detective needs a notebook. In Parallel Experiment, players can jot down notes, sketch solutions, and interact with the environment in creative ways. But we all know what you're going to draw first…

- Annoy Each Other

​This is a key feature? Yes. Yes, it is. ​

​Each level will have some way for players to annoy their co-op partner: knock on a window to distract them, poke them, make their screens shake. You already know you'll be doing this just by reading it, right?



Parallel Experiment has a variety of mind-twisting challenges that push the boundaries of cooperative puzzle design, offering situations never seen before in other games.

mo.description:
SOLVE A CRYPTIC BOX
Unboxing the Cryptic Killer is the first standalone chapter to the cooperative point-and-click puzzle game series 'Cryptic Killer'. Join forces with a friend and play as detective partners Ally and Old Dog in our debut two-player escape room adventure.



IMPORTANT: "Unboxing the Cryptic Killer" is a 2-player cooperative puzzle game, that requires each player to have their own copy on either mobile, tablet, PC or Mac. Internet connection and voice communication are essential. Need a Player Two? Join our Discord community!



Two seasoned detectives, Ally and Old Dog, are entangled in a chilling unsolved case. Lured on a perilous trail, they fall into the clutches of the enigmatic Cryptic Killer they've been relentlessly pursuing. The stakes are sky-high as two innocent lives hang in the balance. In order to save them, Ally and Old Dog must unravel a box of intricate puzzles masterfully designed by the nefarious killer. Test your mettle and join this high-stakes race against time, where every puzzle solved is a step closer to unmasking the Cryptic Killer.



THE ONLY WAY TO ESCAPE IS TO WORK TOGETHER
Unboxing the Cryptic Killer is a puzzle for exactly two players. The name of the game is collaboration. Each player takes on one of the two roles and works their way through a series of challenging puzzles. You'll each see one half of the same puzzle and must work together to crack the codes and escape the Cryptic Killer's clutches.



FEATURES LIST
▶Two Player Co-Op 
In Unboxing the Cryptic Killer, the detectives are separated. You’ll see different items and clues than your partner, and will be tested on your communication!
▶Challenging Collaborative Puzzles
Two brains are better than one when it comes to cracking the Cryptic Killer's codes.
▶Unravel a Thrilling Story
Track the Cryptic Killer's movements as Detectives Old Dog and Ally in this ongoing murder mystery saga.
▶Explore Illustrated Worlds
Unboxing the Cryptic Killer features hand-illustrated environments that are inspired by noir novels.
▶Draw on… Everything!
You cannot solve a case without taking notes. At any time in the game, you can whip out a notebook and pen to make notes and scribble on your environment.

SEIZE FORBIDDEN TREASURES. SUMMON ALIEN GODS. FEED ON YOUR DISCIPLES.

BE WARNED. This game has no tutorial - part of the challenge is figuring out how to play. It's hard, but keep trying, and you'll master it. Good luck!

In this infamous roguelike narrative card game, play as a seeker after unholy mysteries in a 1920s-themed setting of hidden gods and secret histories. Become a scholar of the unseen arts. Craft tools and summon spirits. Indoctrinate innocents. Seize your place as the herald of a new age.

Cultist Simulator was first released on PC and has more than 200,000 players all over the world. Now we’re bringing the cosmic mysteries of Cultist Simulator to mobile.

• Challenging roguelike gameplay - There is never only one history.
Cultist Simulator doesn’t hold your hand. Experiment, expire and transcend death with a story-driven legacy system. Over time you’ll learn enough to wrestle the game to its knees.

• Intense, immersive narrative – Combine cards to tell your own story.
A hefty novel’s worth of choice-based storytelling, from the creator of Fallen London and Sunless Sea. There are many paths through this game of ambition, appetite and abomination, and many ways your tale can end.

• A rich Lovecraftian world – Corrupt your friends and consume your enemies.
Search your dreams for sanity-twisting rituals. Translate grimoires and glean their lore. Penetrate the realm of the Hours and win a place in their service. Cultist Simulator brings the peripheral horror of Lovecraft’s tales to an entirely new setting.

Expand your knowledge with the DLCs: New Legacies, New Ascensions, New Mechanics...
• The Dancer - Join the Bacchanal

tw.description: The table features the player as a member of a space fleet that completes missions to increase rank. Players can attain nine different ranks (listed from lowest to highest): Cadet, Ensign, Lieutenant, Captain, LT Commander, Commander, Commodore, Admiral, and Fleet Admiral. Players accept a mission by hitting "mission targets" which select which mission they will take, and by going up the "launch ramp". Each mission has a set number of things for players to do, such as hitting the "attack bumpers" (which are a set of four bumpers at the top of the table) eight times (this is the "target practice" mission). Some missions involve a number of steps which must be completed in sequence. Missions end either by being completed, or by being aborted due to running out of "fuel", as indicated by the lights in the passage that passes under the launch ramp. The "fuel" lights go out one by one at a time interval, and can be re-lit by having the ball go over them, or all at once by going up the launch ramp again. Upon completing a mission, some of the blue lights in a circle in the middle of the table turn on. When all of the lights in the blue circle turn on, the player's rank increases, and a light in the orange circle turns on.

Motorsport Manager Mobile 3 is the ultimate race team strategy game. 

Build up your very own motorsport team from scratch, making every big decision. Hire the drivers, assemble the team, develop your car and mastermind your way to glory.

真正的工廠 - 充滿樂趣
您是大老闆，現在是時候負責您自己的桌面工廠了。組織工廠車間，管理您的工人，購買機械並設計高效的生產線 - 所有這些都在規定期限內完成，並讓您的客戶滿意！ 

開放式沙盒體驗
放輕鬆，這是一個沙盒體驗游戲，您可以在其中思考、衡量和鑽研事物，直到它們按照您想要的方式工作。當您生產超過50種獨特的產品類型（由多個零件和零件製成）時，向客戶和不斷變化的市場供應產品 - 所有這些都可以用不同的材料和生產方法來製造。沒有兩個工廠看起來相同。

小小手，大夢想
從一個小作坊開始，然後擴展到佈滿桌子的工廠。解鎖更先進的機器，增加更多的生產方法，還有最重要的，增加空間。很快，您將運行多條生產線，每天生產成百上千的先進產品，並欣喜地觀看可愛的工人完成實際工作。

- 各種各樣的行業和廣泛的產品
- 側重於實際問題，而不是價值、經濟或物流
- 在藍圖上組織生產的所有步驟

- 可愛的模型城鎮藝術風格

經典的砍殺遊戲終於推出 iOS 版，Heart Machine這款曾獲獎的遊戲現在以最精良且優質的特殊版本登場。


► 在享有盛譽的獨立遊戲節（Independent Games Festival）中獲得觀眾人氣大獎以及最佳視覺美術獎。

► 在最佳視覺設計、最佳音效以及最佳原創遊戲類別中獲得超過 14 項提名。

► 9/10 Destructoid – 卓越表現的典範。儘管有缺失但仍瑕不掩瑜，且不至於對遊戲造成重大影響。

► 9.5/10 Game Informer – 配樂、美術以及打鬥場景值得您沉浸其中並深入探索。

► Eurogamer 推薦 – Heart Machine 開發的砍殺遊戲不僅充滿挑戰性，且非常細緻，畫面也十分漂亮。

► 9/10 GameSpot – 不僅僅是單純的畫面漂亮；《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》所呈現的視覺效果可以指引您，且讓您放鬆。在緊張刺激的打鬥場景中，壯觀美景能讓您稍喘口氣。 

► 8.5 Polygon – 無論是思考戰略的時刻或是驚險的動作場景，《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》取得了兩者之間的完美平衡。

► Darkstation 5 顆星–上帝視角的動作角色扮演遊戲《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》非常棒：漂亮、迷人的世界供探索、遊戲操作靈敏、悅耳的配樂，並且對玩家有信心，相信他們可以自己想出遊戲進行的方式。


黑暗且暴力的過往陰影籠罩著這片不羈之地，當中滿是寶藏與鮮血。這個世界的旅者是收藏家，專門收集遺忘的知識、失落的科技以及破碎的歷史。我們的旅者被一種無法滿足的疾病纏身，朝著時間埋葬之地深入挺進，希望能找到治癒重症的方法。

《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》是動作冒險角色扮演遊戲，使用經典的16-bit 模式，再加上現代化的遊戲機制與更大規模的設計。探索這個美麗且廣大的荒廢之地，當中危機四伏且暗藏著失落科技。


特色：

● 支援 iPad Pro 120 fps 的畫面幀率/支援 iPhone 與 iPad 60 fps的畫面幀率。
● 與 MFi 控制手把相容。
● 遊戲中心（Game Center）成就。
● 觸覺震動。
● 從每一位角色到細緻的背景元素，一切都是手繪動畫的心血傑作。
● 容易上手但難以駕馭；敵人又壞又多，處處危機讓您脆弱的身體不堪一擊，且盟友又寥寥可數。
● 升級武器、學習新技能、探索裝備，在這個黑暗且暗藏細節的世界中，穿越一條條的路徑支線，揭開秘密。
● 沉浸在由Disasterpeace 所作的美妙配樂中。
● 不僅有原始遊戲中的所有內容，再加上更多武器、敵人以及特殊版本的區域。

Don`t Starve: Pocket Edition行動版將深受超過4百萬玩家喜愛的熱門PC遊戲移植到了iPhone和iPad平台。現在你可以隨時隨地進入充滿科學和魔法元素的世界，體驗原汁原味的荒野生存遊戲！

你扮演威爾遜，一位被困住並傳送到神秘荒野世界的勇敢無畏的紳士科學家。如果威爾遜希望逃出生天並找到回家的路，他必須充分利用所處的環境及這裡的各種生物。

進入一個光怪陸離而未經探索的世界，這裡充滿了奇怪的生物以及形形色色的危險和意外。收集資源以製作符合你的生存風格的物品和建築。一路解開這塊奇怪大陸上的各種謎團。

********************************************************

獎項：
- 獨立遊戲節：大獎提名
 - 獨立遊戲節：優秀設計獎提名
 - 獨立遊戲節：玩家選擇獎提名
 - Capsule Computers：編輯選擇獎
 - Indie Game Reviewer：年度最佳遊戲

針對觸控操作進行優化：新的直觀觸控介面讓你可以輕鬆探索、戰鬥、合成和管理物品。

原汁原味的生存和世界探索體驗：沒有說明。沒有幫助。無需手持。從一無所有開始，為了生存而合成物品、捕獵、研究、耕種和戰鬥。

黑暗而異想天開的視覺效果：處於獨特3D世界中的2D人物和古怪生物。

隨機產生的新世界：想要新地圖？沒問題！你可以隨時產生一個不斷變化的全新世界，它憎恨你並想你死掉。

tw.description:
IMPORTANT: "Parallel Experiment" is a 2-player cooperative puzzle game with escape room-like elements. Each player must have their own copy on either mobile, tablet, PC or Mac (cross-platform play is supported).

In the game players take on the roles of two detectives who are often separated, each with different clues, and must work together to solve puzzles.  Internet connection and voice communication are essential. Need a Player Two? Join our community on Discord!

ABOUT THE GAME

Parallel Experiment is a noir-inspired adventure with a comic book art style, featuring detectives Ally and Old Dog. While following the trail of the dangerous Cryptic Killer, they suddenly become his targets and are now unwilling participants in his twisted experiment. 

This is the second standalone chapter in the “Cryptic Killer” cooperative point-and-click puzzle game series. You can play Unboxing the Cryptic Killer first, if you want to learn more about our detectives and their nemesis, but Parallel Experiment can be enjoyed without prior knowledge.

KEY FEATURES

- Two Player Co-Op

​In Parallel Experiment, players must rely on their communication skills as they’re separated and must each discover unique clues that are vital for solving puzzles on the other end. Teamwork is essential to crack the Cryptic Killer’s codes.

- Challenging Collaborative Puzzles

​There are over 80 puzzles striking the perfect balance between challenging yet fair. But you're not facing them on your own! Communicate with your partner on how to best proceed, solve a puzzle on your end that unlocks the next step for them and discover a wide variety of puzzles from redirecting water flows, finding computer passwords and unlocking intricate locks, to deciphering cryptic ciphers, soldering electronic components, and even waking up a drunk!

- Two Can Play That Game

​Looking for a break from the main investigation? Dive into a variety of retro-inspired mini-games designed with a fresh cooperative twist. Challenge each other to darts, Three in a Row, Match Three, Claw Machine, Push and Pull, and more. Think you know these classics? We’ve reinvented them for a whole new co-op experience

- Cooperative Dialogues

​Uncover vital clues through collaborative conversations. NPCs respond dynamically to each player, offering new layers of interaction that only teamwork can unravel. Some conversations are puzzles in themselves that you need to solve together!

- A story told in panels

Our love for comic books shines in Parallel Experiment. Every cutscene is presented as a beautifully crafted comic book page, immersing you in a gripping, noir-inspired narrative.

How many pages did we create to tell the story? Almost 100 pages! Even we were surprised by how much it took, but every panel was worth it to deliver a story that keeps you on edge until the very last frame.

- Draw on… Everything!

​Every detective needs a notebook. In Parallel Experiment, players can jot down notes, sketch solutions, and interact with the environment in creative ways. But we all know what you're going to draw first…

- Annoy Each Other

​This is a key feature? Yes. Yes, it is. ​

​Each level will have some way for players to annoy their co-op partner: knock on a window to distract them, poke them, make their screens shake. You already know you'll be doing this just by reading it, right?



Parallel Experiment has a variety of mind-twisting challenges that push the boundaries of cooperative puzzle design, offering situations never seen before in other games.

tw.description:
SOLVE A CRYPTIC BOX
Unboxing the Cryptic Killer is the first standalone chapter to the cooperative point-and-click puzzle game series 'Cryptic Killer'. Join forces with a friend and play as detective partners Ally and Old Dog in our debut two-player escape room adventure.



IMPORTANT: "Unboxing the Cryptic Killer" is a 2-player cooperative puzzle game, that requires each player to have their own copy on either mobile, tablet, PC or Mac. Internet connection and voice communication are essential. Need a Player Two? Join our Discord community!



Two seasoned detectives, Ally and Old Dog, are entangled in a chilling unsolved case. Lured on a perilous trail, they fall into the clutches of the enigmatic Cryptic Killer they've been relentlessly pursuing. The stakes are sky-high as two innocent lives hang in the balance. In order to save them, Ally and Old Dog must unravel a box of intricate puzzles masterfully designed by the nefarious killer. Test your mettle and join this high-stakes race against time, where every puzzle solved is a step closer to unmasking the Cryptic Killer.



THE ONLY WAY TO ESCAPE IS TO WORK TOGETHER
Unboxing the Cryptic Killer is a puzzle for exactly two players. The name of the game is collaboration. Each player takes on one of the two roles and works their way through a series of challenging puzzles. You'll each see one half of the same puzzle and must work together to crack the codes and escape the Cryptic Killer's clutches.



FEATURES LIST
▶Two Player Co-Op 
In Unboxing the Cryptic Killer, the detectives are separated. You’ll see different items and clues than your partner, and will be tested on your communication!
▶Challenging Collaborative Puzzles
Two brains are better than one when it comes to cracking the Cryptic Killer's codes.
▶Unravel a Thrilling Story
Track the Cryptic Killer's movements as Detectives Old Dog and Ally in this ongoing murder mystery saga.
▶Explore Illustrated Worlds
Unboxing the Cryptic Killer features hand-illustrated environments that are inspired by noir novels.
▶Draw on… Everything!
You cannot solve a case without taking notes. At any time in the game, you can whip out a notebook and pen to make notes and scribble on your environment.

tw.description:
SEIZE FORBIDDEN TREASURES. SUMMON ALIEN GODS. FEED ON YOUR DISCIPLES.

BE WARNED. This game has no tutorial - part of the challenge is figuring out how to play. It's hard, but keep trying, and you'll master it. Good luck!

In this infamous roguelike narrative card game, play as a seeker after unholy mysteries in a 1920s-themed setting of hidden gods and secret histories. Become a scholar of the unseen arts. Craft tools and summon spirits. Indoctrinate innocents. Seize your place as the herald of a new age.

Cultist Simulator was first released on PC and has more than 200,000 players all over the world. Now we’re bringing the cosmic mysteries of Cultist Simulator to mobile.

• Challenging roguelike gameplay - There is never only one history.
Cultist Simulator doesn’t hold your hand. Experiment, expire and transcend death with a story-driven legacy system. Over time you’ll learn enough to wrestle the game to its knees.

• Intense, immersive narrative – Combine cards to tell your own story.
A hefty novel’s worth of choice-based storytelling, from the creator of Fallen London and Sunless Sea. There are many paths through this game of ambition, appetite and abomination, and many ways your tale can end.

• A rich Lovecraftian world – Corrupt your friends and consume your enemies.
Search your dreams for sanity-twisting rituals. Translate grimoires and glean their lore. Penetrate the realm of the Hours and win a place in their service. Cultist Simulator brings the peripheral horror of Lovecraft’s tales to an entirely new setting.

Expand your knowledge with the DLCs: New Legacies, New Ascensions, New Mechanics...
• The Dancer - Join the Bacchanal
• The Priest - Knock, and Ye Shall Be Opened
• The Ghoul - Taste of the graveyard's fruit
• The Exile - Some there are who will not yield

If you encounter any issue with the game, please click on “Contact us” at the bottom of this page and give us as many details as possible regarding the issue and your device: https://playdigious.helpshift.com/hc/en/11-cultist-simulator/?p=ios

*線上合作模式現已開放：分享代碼給好友，一起冒險吧！*

《Children of Morta》是一款以故事為主軸的動作 RPG，結合了 Roguelite 的角色成長特色。在遊戲中，玩家將操控的不僅僅是一位角色，而是一個非凡的英雄家族。

在隨機生成的地牢、洞穴和土地中砍殺成群的敵人，帶領擁有各自優缺點的柏格森家族對抗即將來臨的腐化。故事發生在遙遠的世界，卻觸及我們每個人都熟悉的情感與主題：愛與希望，渴望與不安，失落……以及為了拯救最重要的人所願意付出的犧牲。
這是一個關於英雄家族團結一致，對抗侵襲黑暗的動人故事。

-- 完全版 --

《Ancient Spirits》和《Paws and Claws》DLC 都包含在主遊戲中並可在遊戲過程中解鎖。

特色
- 歡迎加入家族！與英雄般的柏格森家族一起面對挑戰，傳承家族榮耀，拯救瑞亞之地免受腐化侵襲
- 同心協力：在這款 Roguelite RPG 中，每次冒險都能提升整個家族的技能和裝備，讓他們變得更強
- 團結力量大：在七位可操控角色間自由切換，每位角色都有獨特的能力、戰鬥風格和迷人的個性
- 沉浸於瑞亞美麗又致命的世界中，精美的 2D 像素藝術結合手工動畫和現代光影技術，帶來視覺享受
- 家族並肩作戰：利用雙人線上合作模式，在每場戰鬥中並肩作戰（此功能將在發佈後更新推出）

精心為手機重新設計
- 全新介面設計——專為手機打造的專屬 UI，完全支援觸控操作
- 支援 Game Center 成就系統
- 雲端存檔——在 iOS 裝置間共享遊戲進度
- 支援 MFi 控制器
- iPhone 15 最佳化（包括 Pro Max）

在這個快節奏的動作rogue-lite遊戲《孤骨勇士》中，失去頭顱反而是戰鬥的一部分。

遊戲擁有100位獨特能力的可操控角色，配合眾多道具，可創造出既瘋狂又具挑戰性的戰鬥。
魔王城廢墟
人類對魔王城的攻擊歷史悠久，此次卻與眾不同。
這次不僅冒險家加入戰鬥，還有帝國軍隊和被稱為「卡倫之英雄」的領袖共同發動全面攻擊，決心一舉根絕魔族。
他們以壓倒性的人數攻陷了魔族堡壘，並成功將其徹底摧毀。城堡中的所有魔族都被俘虜，唯獨一個名叫「孤骨」的孤獨骷髏逃脫了。
黑暗鏡子模式
完成主線故事後，挑戰自我極限，試試全新的「黑暗鏡子」模式吧！

遊戲特色
- 在這場魔族的絕望之中，你是最後的希望！化身為小小骷髏「孤骨」，踏上旅程去擊敗狂妄的英雄們，解救被卡倫墮落軍隊俘虜的魔王。
- 換上新的孤骨，感受失去頭顱的痛快：借用前任擁有者的力量和華服，搭配獨特的道具來創造連鎖技能，戰勝敵人。
- 不死不休：在這款動作滿載的rogue-lite平台遊戲中，你將迎接一切挑戰，直至最終。
- 觀賞充滿活力、風格卡通的像素藝術2D動畫，幫助各種魔族生物恢復本來面目。
- 從埃及的木乃伊到希臘的牛頭怪，甚至《Dead Cells》的官方跨界合作……你能找到遊戲中所有有趣的彩蛋嗎？

us.description: The table features the player as a member of a space fleet that completes missions to increase rank. Players can attain nine different ranks (listed from lowest to highest): Cadet, Ensign, Lieutenant, Captain, LT Commander, Commander, Commodore, Admiral, and Fleet Admiral. Players accept a mission by hitting "mission targets" which select which mission they will take, and by going up the "launch ramp". Each mission has a set number of things for players to do, such as hitting the "attack bumpers" (which are a set of four bumpers at the top of the table) eight times (this is the "target practice" mission). Some missions involve a number of steps which must be completed in sequence. Missions end either by being completed, or by being aborted due to running out of "fuel", as indicated by the lights in the passage that passes under the launch ramp. The "fuel" lights go out one by one at a time interval, and can be re-lit by having the ball go over them, or all at once by going up the launch ramp again. Upon completing a mission, some of the blue lights in a circle in the middle of the table turn on. When all of the lights in the blue circle turn on, the player's rank increases, and a light in the orange circle turns on.

us.description:
Lumy is a modern sun tracker + outdoor activity planner.

- Perfect lighting for photos or videos? Done.
- Sunrise hike or sunset walk? Easy.
- Outdoor yoga or sunlight breaks? Covered.

Whether you’re chasing golden hour* or keeping an eye on moon phases for a night under the stars, Lumy helps you make the most of natural light.

Now redesigned from the ground up - Lumy feels more personal, purposeful, and in sync with how we live. 

Introducing Modes: Switch between profiles like Daily, Photography, or Meditation to shape Lumy around your routine. See only what matters to you.

Lumy also supports iOS’s State of Mind feature, offering sunlight suggestions based on your mood entries in the Health app - a gentle nudge to step out and connect with nature.

And with weather forecasts for the next seven days, you can plan with confidence. Lumy calculates all sun and moon data entirely on-device. No tracking. No server calls. Only the weather needs internet.

Lumy works seamlessly across iPhone, iPad, Apple Watch, Apple TV, and HomePod. One purchase, full family access.

Features
- Modes: Switch profiles based on your needs... from weekday planning to weekend golden hour.
- Sun + Moon Tracking: Accurate data, solar compass, and future predictions.
- Season Info: Both astronomical and meteorological seasons.
- Remainders: Custom repeatable notifications.
- Apple Watch: Complications, Double-tap, and Live Activities.
- Widgets + Control Center: Quick access via Smart Stack and more.
- Interaction Upgrades: Time travel slider, Quick Access Button, fluid animations.
- Visual Feel: Simulated light, shimmering glows, and enhanced Classic visuals.
- Accessibility: VoiceOver, Dynamic Type, Reduce Motion, and more.
- Privacy First: Fully offline (except weather). Your data stays with you.
- Localization: Available in Japanese, Chinese, French, and German.

Lumy helps photographers, outdoor lovers, and wellness seekers stay in sync with the sun and moon.

*What's Golden Hour?
Golden Hour (or Magic Hour) is the short time after sunrise or before sunset when the light is soft, warm, and perfect for capturing stunning photos or videos.

Sun Information Available:
Sunrise, Sunset, First Light, Last Light, Golden Hour, Blue Hour, Astronomical Twilight, Nautical Twilight, Civil Twilight, Solar Noon, Solar Midnight.

Moon Information Available:
Moonrise, Moonset, Altitude, Azimuth, Transit, Transit Elevation, Weekly Moon Phase, Next Full Moon, New Moon, First Quarter, Last Quarter.

Got feedback or suggestions? We’d love to hear from you! Reach out at hello@waplestuff.com.

us.description:
IMPORTANT: "Parallel Experiment" is a 2-player cooperative puzzle game with escape room-like elements. Each player must have their own copy on either mobile, tablet, PC or Mac (cross-platform play is supported).

In the game players take on the roles of two detectives who are often separated, each with different clues, and must work together to solve puzzles.  Internet connection and voice communication are essential. Need a Player Two? Join our community on Discord!

ABOUT THE GAME

Parallel Experiment is a noir-inspired adventure with a comic book art style, featuring detectives Ally and Old Dog. While following the trail of the dangerous Cryptic Killer, they suddenly become his targets and are now unwilling participants in his twisted experiment. 

This is the second standalone chapter in the “Cryptic Killer” cooperative point-and-click puzzle game series. You can play Unboxing the Cryptic Killer first, if you want to learn more about our detectives and their nemesis, but Parallel Experiment can be enjoyed without prior knowledge.

KEY FEATURES

- Two Player Co-Op

​In Parallel Experiment, players must rely on their communication skills as they’re separated and must each discover unique clues that are vital for solving puzzles on the other end. Teamwork is essential to crack the Cryptic Killer’s codes.

- Challenging Collaborative Puzzles

​There are over 80 puzzles striking the perfect balance between challenging yet fair. But you're not facing them on your own! Communicate with your partner on how to best proceed, solve a puzzle on your end that unlocks the next step for them and discover a wide variety of puzzles from redirecting water flows, finding computer passwords and unlocking intricate locks, to deciphering cryptic ciphers, soldering electronic components, and even waking up a drunk!

- Two Can Play That Game

​Looking for a break from the main investigation? Dive into a variety of retro-inspired mini-games designed with a fresh cooperative twist. Challenge each other to darts, Three in a Row, Match Three, Claw Machine, Push and Pull, and more. Think you know these classics? We’ve reinvented them for a whole new co-op experience

- Cooperative Dialogues

​Uncover vital clues through collaborative conversations. NPCs respond dynamically to each player, offering new layers of interaction that only teamwork can unravel. Some conversations are puzzles in themselves that you need to solve together!

- A story told in panels

Our love for comic books shines in Parallel Experiment. Every cutscene is presented as a beautifully crafted comic book page, immersing you in a gripping, noir-inspired narrative.

How many pages did we create to tell the story? Almost 100 pages! Even we were surprised by how much it took, but every panel was worth it to deliver a story that keeps you on edge until the very last frame.

- Draw on… Everything!

​Every detective needs a notebook. In Parallel Experiment, players can jot down notes, sketch solutions, and interact with the environment in creative ways. But we all know what you're going to draw first…

- Annoy Each Other

​This is a key feature? Yes. Yes, it is. ​

​Each level will have some way for players to annoy their co-op partner: knock on a window to distract them, poke them, make their screens shake. You already know you'll be doing this just by reading it, right?



Parallel Experiment has a variety of mind-twisting challenges that push the boundaries of cooperative puzzle design, offering situations never seen before in other games.

us.description:
SOLVE A CRYPTIC BOX
Unboxing the Cryptic Killer is the first standalone chapter to the cooperative point-and-click puzzle game series 'Cryptic Killer'. Join forces with a friend and play as detective partners Ally and Old Dog in our debut two-player escape room adventure.



IMPORTANT: "Unboxing the Cryptic Killer" is a 2-player cooperative puzzle game, that requires each player to have their own copy on either mobile, tablet, PC or Mac. Internet connection and voice communication are essential. Need a Player Two? Join our Discord community!



Two seasoned detectives, Ally and Old Dog, are entangled in a chilling unsolved case. Lured on a perilous trail, they fall into the clutches of the enigmatic Cryptic Killer they've been relentlessly pursuing. The stakes are sky-high as two innocent lives hang in the balance. In order to save them, Ally and Old Dog must unravel a box of intricate puzzles masterfully designed by the nefarious killer. Test your mettle and join this high-stakes race against time, where every puzzle solved is a step closer to unmasking the Cryptic Killer.



THE ONLY WAY TO ESCAPE IS TO WORK TOGETHER
Unboxing the Cryptic Killer is a puzzle for exactly two players. The name of the game is collaboration. Each player takes on one of the two roles and works their way through a series of challenging puzzles. You'll each see one half of the same puzzle and must work together to crack the codes and escape the Cryptic Killer's clutches.



FEATURES LIST
▶Two Player Co-Op 
In Unboxing the Cryptic Killer, the detectives are separated. You’ll see different items and clues than your partner, and will be tested on your communication!
▶Challenging Collaborative Puzzles
Two brains are better than one when it comes to cracking the Cryptic Killer's codes.
▶Unravel a Thrilling Story
Track the Cryptic Killer's movements as Detectives Old Dog and Ally in this ongoing murder mystery saga.
▶Explore Illustrated Worlds
Unboxing the Cryptic Killer features hand-illustrated environments that are inspired by noir novels.
▶Draw on… Everything!
You cannot solve a case without taking notes. At any time in the game, you can whip out a notebook and pen to make notes and scribble on your environment.

tr.description: The table features the player as a member of a space fleet that completes missions to increase rank. Players can attain nine different ranks (listed from lowest to highest): Cadet, Ensign, Lieutenant, Captain, LT Commander, Commander, Commodore, Admiral, and Fleet Admiral. Players accept a mission by hitting "mission targets" which select which mission they will take, and by going up the "launch ramp". Each mission has a set number of things for players to do, such as hitting the "attack bumpers" (which are a set of four bumpers at the top of the table) eight times (this is the "target practice" mission). Some missions involve a number of steps which must be completed in sequence. Missions end either by being completed, or by being aborted due to running out of "fuel", as indicated by the lights in the passage that passes under the launch ramp. The "fuel" lights go out one by one at a time interval, and can be re-lit by having the ball go over them, or all at once by going up the launch ramp again. Upon completing a mission, some of the blue lights in a circle in the middle of the table turn on. When all of the lights in the blue circle turn on, the player's rank increases, and a light in the orange circle turns on.

tr.description:
IMPORTANT: "Parallel Experiment" is a 2-player cooperative puzzle game with escape room-like elements. Each player must have their own copy on either mobile, tablet, PC or Mac (cross-platform play is supported).

In the game players take on the roles of two detectives who are often separated, each with different clues, and must work together to solve puzzles.  Internet connection and voice communication are essential. Need a Player Two? Join our community on Discord!

ABOUT THE GAME

Parallel Experiment is a noir-inspired adventure with a comic book art style, featuring detectives Ally and Old Dog. While following the trail of the dangerous Cryptic Killer, they suddenly become his targets and are now unwilling participants in his twisted experiment. 

This is the second standalone chapter in the “Cryptic Killer” cooperative point-and-click puzzle game series. You can play Unboxing the Cryptic Killer first, if you want to learn more about our detectives and their nemesis, but Parallel Experiment can be enjoyed without prior knowledge.

KEY FEATURES

- Two Player Co-Op

​In Parallel Experiment, players must rely on their communication skills as they’re separated and must each discover unique clues that are vital for solving puzzles on the other end. Teamwork is essential to crack the Cryptic Killer’s codes.

- Challenging Collaborative Puzzles

​There are over 80 puzzles striking the perfect balance between challenging yet fair. But you're not facing them on your own! Communicate with your partner on how to best proceed, solve a puzzle on your end that unlocks the next step for them and discover a wide variety of puzzles from redirecting water flows, finding computer passwords and unlocking intricate locks, to deciphering cryptic ciphers, soldering electronic components, and even waking up a drunk!

- Two Can Play That Game

​Looking for a break from the main investigation? Dive into a variety of retro-inspired mini-games designed with a fresh cooperative twist. Challenge each other to darts, Three in a Row, Match Three, Claw Machine, Push and Pull, and more. Think you know these classics? We’ve reinvented them for a whole new co-op experience

- Cooperative Dialogues

​Uncover vital clues through collaborative conversations. NPCs respond dynamically to each player, offering new layers of interaction that only teamwork can unravel. Some conversations are puzzles in themselves that you need to solve together!

- A story told in panels

Our love for comic books shines in Parallel Experiment. Every cutscene is presented as a beautifully crafted comic book page, immersing you in a gripping, noir-inspired narrative.

How many pages did we create to tell the story? Almost 100 pages! Even we were surprised by how much it took, but every panel was worth it to deliver a story that keeps you on edge until the very last frame.

- Draw on… Everything!

​Every detective needs a notebook. In Parallel Experiment, players can jot down notes, sketch solutions, and interact with the environment in creative ways. But we all know what you're going to draw first…

- Annoy Each Other

​This is a key feature? Yes. Yes, it is. ​

​Each level will have some way for players to annoy their co-op partner: knock on a window to distract them, poke them, make their screens shake. You already know you'll be doing this just by reading it, right?



Parallel Experiment has a variety of mind-twisting challenges that push the boundaries of cooperative puzzle design, offering situations never seen before in other games.

tr.description:
SOLVE A CRYPTIC BOX
Unboxing the Cryptic Killer is the first standalone chapter to the cooperative point-and-click puzzle game series 'Cryptic Killer'. Join forces with a friend and play as detective partners Ally and Old Dog in our debut two-player escape room adventure.



IMPORTANT: "Unboxing the Cryptic Killer" is a 2-player cooperative puzzle game, that requires each player to have their own copy on either mobile, tablet, PC or Mac. Internet connection and voice communication are essential. Need a Player Two? Join our Discord community!



Two seasoned detectives, Ally and Old Dog, are entangled in a chilling unsolved case. Lured on a perilous trail, they fall into the clutches of the enigmatic Cryptic Killer they've been relentlessly pursuing. The stakes are sky-high as two innocent lives hang in the balance. In order to save them, Ally and Old Dog must unravel a box of intricate puzzles masterfully designed by the nefarious killer. Test your mettle and join this high-stakes race against time, where every puzzle solved is a step closer to unmasking the Cryptic Killer.



THE ONLY WAY TO ESCAPE IS TO WORK TOGETHER
Unboxing the Cryptic Killer is a puzzle for exactly two players. The name of the game is collaboration. Each player takes on one of the two roles and works their way through a series of challenging puzzles. You'll each see one half of the same puzzle and must work together to crack the codes and escape the Cryptic Killer's clutches.



FEATURES LIST
▶Two Player Co-Op 
In Unboxing the Cryptic Killer, the detectives are separated. You’ll see different items and clues than your partner, and will be tested on your communication!
▶Challenging Collaborative Puzzles
Two brains are better than one when it comes to cracking the Cryptic Killer's codes.
▶Unravel a Thrilling Story
Track the Cryptic Killer's movements as Detectives Old Dog and Ally in this ongoing murder mystery saga.
▶Explore Illustrated Worlds
Unboxing the Cryptic Killer features hand-illustrated environments that are inspired by noir novels.
▶Draw on… Everything!
You cannot solve a case without taking notes. At any time in the game, you can whip out a notebook and pen to make notes and scribble on your environment.

SEIZE FORBIDDEN TREASURES. SUMMON ALIEN GODS. FEED ON YOUR DISCIPLES.

BE WARNED. This game has no tutorial - part of the challenge is figuring out how to play. It's hard, but keep trying, and you'll master it. Good luck!

In this infamous roguelike narrative card game, play as a seeker after unholy mysteries in a 1920s-themed setting of hidden gods and secret histories. Become a scholar of the unseen arts. Craft tools and summon spirits. Indoctrinate innocents. Seize your place as the herald of a new age.

Cultist Simulator was first released on PC and has more than 200,000 players all over the world. Now we’re bringing the cosmic mysteries of Cultist Simulator to mobile.

• Challenging roguelike gameplay - There is never only one history.
Cultist Simulator doesn’t hold your hand. Experiment, expire and transcend death with a story-driven legacy system. Over time you’ll learn enough to wrestle the game to its knees.

• Intense, immersive narrative – Combine cards to tell your own story.
A hefty novel’s worth of choice-based storytelling, from the creator of Fallen London and Sunless Sea. There are many paths through this game of ambition, appetite and abomination, and many ways your tale can end.

• A rich Lovecraftian world – Corrupt your friends and consume your enemies.
Search your dreams for sanity-twisting rituals. Translate grimoires and glean their lore. Penetrate the realm of the Hours and win a place in their service. Cultist Simulator brings the peripheral horror of Lovecraft’s tales to an entirely new setting.

Expand your knowledge with the DLCs: New Legacies, New Ascensions, New Mechanics...
• The Dancer - Join the Bacchanal
• The Priest - Knock, and Ye Shall Be Opened
• The Ghoul - Taste of the graveyard's fruit

Skul is a fast-paced action rogue-lite where losing your head is encouraged. 

Featuring 100 playable characters each with their own unique abilities and a ton of items that can create wild synergies, the battles are as electrifying as they are challenging.

The Demon King's Castle in Ruins
The human race attacking the Demon King's castle is nothing new and has happened countless times before.
What makes this time different though, is that the Adventurers decided to join forces with the Imperial Army and the 'Hero of Caerleon' to lead a full onslaught in hopes of wiping out the Demons once and for all. 
They attacked the Demon stronghold with overwhelming numbers and succeeded in its total destruction. All of the demons in the castle were taken prisoner except for one lone skeleton named 'Skul'.

Dark Mirror Mode
Once you're through with the main story, test your skills and limits in the new challenging 'Dark Mirror' mode!

FEATURES
-You’re the last hope of the entire demon race! Play as Skul, a tiny skeleton on a path to slay the pompous heroes and save the demon king from the corrupt army of Carleon.  
-Losing your head never felt so right: try on new skulls to borrow the powers and dashing outfits of their previous owners and create synergies with unique items to defeat your enemies.

Staying on task seems is a real challenge for our screen-bound generation. The Be Focused lets you get things done by breaking up individual tasks among discrete intervals, separated by short breaks. It’s a surprisingly effective way to retain motivation and focus. Create tasks, configure breaks and track your progress throughout the day, week or custom period. Use Be Focused on your iPhone, iPad, or Mac — everything stays perfectly in sync.

Task Management

•	Create and manage tasks
•	Add notes and due dates to tasks
•	Organize tasks with tags and filters
•	Paste task lists from other apps

Timer Control

•	Start, pause, or skip intervals
•	Auto-start the next interval (optionally)
•	Plan intervals needed for task completion and track accuracy
•	Manage completed intervals

Timer Customization

•	Set durations for work sessions, short and long breaks
•	Define number of intervals before a long break
•	Set a daily goal for completed intervals 
•	Assign different timer settings to individual tasks

Reports

•	View detailed reports to monitor your progress
•	Export your data in CSV format

Sounds and Notifications

•	Chronometer ticking sound with adjustable frequency
•	Variety of alarm sounds
•	Interactive notifications
•	Adjustable volume for alarms and chronometer

Integration

•	Sync across all your devices (iPhone, iPad, Mac) *
•	Integration with Focus Matrix to manage tasks using urgent/important principle **
•	Integration with Shortcuts app to automate workflow

Quick Access

•	Widgets for Lock Screen and Home Screen
•	Live activities for Lock Screen and Dynamic Island
•	Control to start or stop the timer from the Lock Screen, Controls Center, or Action Button

Automation

Device Support

•	Also available for Mac

Motorsport Manager Mobile 3 é o jogo definitivo de estratégia em equipe e corrida. 

Monte sua própria equipe de corridas do zero tomando as decisões mais importantes. Contrate pilotos, monte a equipe, desenvolva seu carro e planeje seu caminho até a glória.

• Esta é a sua equipe de corrida. Contrate motoristas, monte seu carro e invista em tecnologia.
• Trabalhe com seus motoristas para fazer uma volta de qualificação perfeita.
• Formule a estratégia ideal de parada técnica para ganhar corridas.
• Veja a corrida em tempo real ou acesse as telas de estratégia e controle a ação.
• Reaja a mudanças de tempo, batidas e períodos de safety car.
• Ganhe campeonatos em todo o mundo para chegar ao auge do automobilismo.

Novo no MM Mobile 3
=====================
CORRIDA GT E RESISTÊNCIA
Com 6 novos campeonatos, o MM Mobile 3 está maior e melhor que nunca. As corridas GT estão recheadas de ação roda a roda, e a Resistência é o desafio supremo estratégico do Motorsport Manager, com 3 pilotos por carro e corridas cronometradas!

CENÁRIO IMPRESSIONANTE
Mônaco faz sua estreia no Motorsport Manager! Gerencie seus carros por La Rascasse, Casino Square e a Piscina. É o teste final representado em um novo estilo de arte lindo e detalhado.

REALIDADE AUMENTADA
O suporte à RA traz a você o modo câmera definitivo! Escolha sua própria perspectiva da corrida. Observe por entre árvores, pelas pontes e descendo colinas experimentando a corrida de um jeito totalmente novo.

O QUE HÁ DE NOVO
A Rede de Fornecedores vê os gerentes crescerem a presença da equipe globalmente, e as Corridas de Confronto são grandes eventos anuais que trazem as corridas internacionais de um jeito exclusivo. Os mecânicos são os novos membros da sua equipe e seu relacionamento com os pilotos é muito importante!

SURPRESAS DO JOGO
O votos guiam as mudanças, o movimento dinâmico das equipes de IA (inclusive com equipes desaparecendo e sendo substituídas) e as novas configurações de dificuldade em um mundo automobilístico que evolui constantemente — mas o desafio fica no seu nível.

Na Little Big Workshop, você se torna um magnata da fabricação!

Fábricas de verdade - só que DIVERTIDAS
Você é o Chefe e é hora de assumir a sua própria fábrica. Organize o chão da fábrica, gerencie seus funcionários, compre maquinário e monte linhas de produção eficientes – tudo dentro do prazo e garantindo a satisfação do cliente! 

Uma experiência aberta sandbox
Vá com calma: essa é uma experiência sandbox em que você pensa, reflete e mexe nas coisas até conseguir deixar as coisas do jeito que quiser. Forneça produtos para clientes num mercado em constante mudança, produzindo mais de 50 tipos únicos de produtos feitos com inúmeras partes e peças – sendo que todos podem ser criados com diferentes materiais e métodos de produção. Não existem duas fábricas iguais.

Mãos pequenas, sonhos grandes
Comece com uma pequena oficina e a transforme numa fábrica cheia de oficinas. Desbloqueie máquinas cada vez mais sofisticadas, acrescente ainda mais métodos de produção e, o mais importante, crie mais espaço. pt.description:
Finalmente, o premiado slash-'em-up da Heart Machine chega ao iOS na sua versão mais polida e refinada de sempre, a Special Edition.


► Vencedor dos prémios "Audience Award" e "Excellence in Visual Art" do prestigiado Independent Games Festival.

► Mais de 14 nomeações nas categorias Melhor Design Visual, Melhor Áudio e Melhor Jogo Original.

► 9/10 Destructoid « Um exemplo de excelência. Podem existir falhas, mas são insignificantes e não causam granes estragos. »

► 9,5/10 Game Informer « A combinação da banda sonora, dos gráficos e dos combates cria um ambiente complexo que vale a pena explorar. »

► Recomendado pela Eurogamer « O slash-'em-up da Heart Machine é esgotante e preciso - e incrivelmente belo. »

► 9/10 GameSpot « É mais do que simplesmente bonito; o Hyper Light Drifter usa os seus gráficos para te guiar e relaxar. As paisagens magníficas desaceleram a pulsação entre sequências de combate difíceis, que te deixam sem fôlego. »

► 8,5 Polygon « O Hyper Light Drifter combina habilmente momentos contemplativos com ação vertiginosa. »

► 5 Estrelas Darkstation « O RPG de ação, visto de cima, Hyper Light Drifter é um jogo espantoso: lindo, um mundo fascinante para explorar, controlos sem falhas, música magnífica e a confiança no jogador que o fará descobrir as coisas sozinho. »


Os ecos de um passado sombrio e violento ressoam através das terras selvagens, repletas de tesouros e sangue. Os Drifters deste mundo são os colecionadores de conhecimentos esquecidos, tecnologias perdidas e histórias desfeitas. O nosso Drifter é assombrado por uma doença insaciável, viajando pelas terras do Tempo Sepultado, na esperança de descobrir uma forma de apaziguar a doença cruel.

Hyper Light Drifter é um RPG de ação/aventura ao estilo dos melhores clássicos de 16 bits, com mecânicas modernizadas e gráficos numa escala grandiosamente superior. Explora um vasto mundo deslumbrante e em ruínas, repleto de perigos e tecnologias esquecidas.


Características:

● Jogabilidade de 120 fps no iPad Pro / 60 fps no iPhone e iPad.
● Compatível com controladores MFi.
● Conquistas no Game Center.
● Vibração táctil.
● Desde as personagens aos elementos subtis do cenário, tudo foi concebido à mão com o maior dos afetos.
● Fácil de aprender, difícil de dominar; os inimigos são cruéis e numerosos, os perigos podem esmagar facilmente o teu corpo frágil e os rostos amigáveis são raros.
● Melhora as armas, aprende novas habilidades, descobre equipamentos e atravessa um mundo sombrio e detalhado onde abundam encruzilhadas e segredos.
● Banda sonora evocativa criada por Disasterpeace.
● Todo o conteúdo do jogo original + mais armas, inimigos e áreas da Special Edition.

Don’t Starve: Pocket Edition leva o sucesso do jogo de PC, adorado por mais de 4 milhões de jogadores, para o iPhone e iPad. Agora você pode se aventurar no jogo de sobrevivência em regiões inóspitas, repleto de ciência e magia em qualquer lugar! 

Jogue com Wilson, um intrépido Cientista Elegante que foi preso e transportado para um mundo inóspito misterioso. Wilson precisa aprender a explorar seu ambiente e seus habitantes para conseguir escapar e encontrar seu caminho de volta para casa. 

Entre num mundo estranho e inexplorado, repleto de criaturas estranhas, perigos e surpresas. Junte recursos para criar itens e estruturas que combinam com seu estilo de sobrevivência. Jogue e vá desvelando os mistérios dessa terra estranha. 

********************************************************

Prêmios:
- Indicado ao grande prêmio do Festival de Jogos Independentes (Independent Games Festival)
- Indicado ao prêmio de excelência em design do Festival de Jogos Independentes (Independent Games Festival)
- Indicado ao prêmio de público no Festival de Jogos Independentes (Independent Games Festival)
- Escolha do editor no Capsule Computers

Principais recursos:

Otimizado para comandos por toque: A nova interface de toque intuitiva permite que você explore, lute, crie e gerencie seu inventário com facilidade.

Sobrevivência e exploração de mundo implacável: Sem instruções. Sem ajuda. Sem orientações detalhadas. Comece com nada e crie, cace, pesquise, cultive e lute para sobreviver.

Visuais sombrios e excêntricos: personagens 2D e criaturas estranhas habitam um mundo 3D único.

Novos mundos gerados aleatoriamente: Quer um mapa novo? Sem problema! A qualquer momento você pode gerar um novo mundo vivo que te odeia e quer que você morra.

pt.description: The table features the player as a member of a space fleet that completes missions to increase rank. Players can attain nine different ranks (listed from lowest to highest): Cadet, Ensign, Lieutenant, Captain, LT Commander, Commander, Commodore, Admiral, and Fleet Admiral. Players accept a mission by hitting "mission targets" which select which mission they will take, and by going up the "launch ramp". Each mission has a set number of things for players to do, such as hitting the "attack bumpers" (which are a set of four bumpers at the top of the table) eight times (this is the "target practice" mission). Some missions involve a number of steps which must be completed in sequence. Missions end either by being completed, or by being aborted due to running out of "fuel", as indicated by the lights in the passage that passes under the launch ramp. The "fuel" lights go out one by one at a time interval, and can be re-lit by having the ball go over them, or all at once by going up the launch ramp again. Upon completing a mission, some of the blue lights in a circle in the middle of the table turn on. When all of the lights in the blue circle turn on, the player's rank increases, and a light in the orange circle turns on.
